nodes.label: Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: Overview
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: Key Findings
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 1. GSD is downstream; our harness is upstream (Source: [[gsd-github-repo]], [[gsd-codecentric-deep-dive]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 2. GSD uses Claude Code as its runtime; we use pi (Source: [[gsd-codecentric-deep-dive]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 3. GSD lacks adversarial verification — our L4 fills that gap (Source: [[gsd-hn-discussion]], [[Source: How to Apply GAN Architecture to Multi-Agent Code Generation]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 4. GSD's context engineering complements our L3 grounding checkpoints (Source: [[gsd-github-repo]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 5. Both systems share skill-first architecture (Source: [[skill-first-architecture]], [[gsd-github-repo]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 6. GSD's state files are a narrower version of our L6 persistent memory (Source: [[gsd-github-repo]], [[persistent-memory]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md

nodes.label: 7. GSD's limitations validate our harness approach (Source: [[gsd-hn-discussion]])
nodes.source_file: /home/aryaniyaps/ai-projects/ultimate-pi/raw/questions/Research: how GSD fits into our coding harness setup.md
